track1_memory_construction.reason: Control-only: no explicit object memory. A multi-frame VLM control builds no object inventory with labels and 3D positions at memory-construction time, so there is no Track 1 object-memory fixed API.

track2_object_location.reason: Control-only: no fixed object-location query API. There is no deterministic native object-location query over memory artifacts; the VLM only reads raw sampled frames at query time.

track3_scanrefer.reason: Control-only: no explicit object memory and no referring-expression resolver over object memory.

track4_openeqa.reason: Control-only: any answering happens over raw frames, not exported memory. This is a no-explicit-memory ablation, not a native QA/retrieval fixed API.
